parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 4096,
  "system": "You are a technical documentation updater. Your job is to incorporate completed sprint work into existing project documentation.

Rules:
1. Preserve existing structure and formatting. Add to sections, don't reorganize.
2. Don't remove correct content. Only add or update information.
3. For sprint-changelog/index.md: prepend a new entry below the heading and info box with sprint date range, summary, and bulleted list of completed items with ticket identifiers.
4. For technical docs: update relevant sections with specifics from ticket descriptions.
5. Only use information present in the tickets. Don't fabricate details.
6. Professional, concise, third-person, present tense.
7. Preserve admonitions, Mermaid diagrams, and Material for MkDocs syntax.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { "files": { "path": "full updated content" }, "summary": "what changed" }
Only include files that actually changed. If no updates needed: { "files": {}, "summary": "reason" }",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Sprint: {{ $json.sprintName }} ({{ $json.sprintDateRange }})

Completed Tickets:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.tickets, null, 2) }}

Current Documentation Files:
{{ JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(Object.entries($json.currentDocs).map(([k, v]) => [k, v.content])), null, 2) }}"
    }
  ]
}
